description: WalletWhistle is a product-price tracking site that aggregates merchant listings, records timestamped price observations, and lets users browse products, price history, and biggest drops. It also offers read-only MCP access to that catalog data for AI clients.
summary: WalletWhistle exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.walletwhistle.com/mcp` with no WalletWhistle credential required; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain.
